name: Sleeping Beauty Draughts
author: Ralf Gering (1986) / AGP port
description: Sleeping Beauty Draughts (Dornröschendame, Ralf Gering 1986): an 8x8 Checkers variant where you may never hold two ladies (kings) at once. A man reaching the back rank while you already have a lady becomes a frozen 'sleeping beauty' that cannot move or be captured — until you lose your lady, when a beauty wakes to replace her (and may make a two-square 'jump of joy'). Men capture enemy men forward and enemy ladies backward; ladies capture by Ferz-style replacement or by king-style jumping. There are no draws: leave the opponent with no legal move to win, scoring a point per piece left on the board.
